name: CoWork
description: Executable tooling for Dexter's Obsidian vault — link hygiene, glossary maintenance, and link rot detection. The vault stays plain text; CoWork is the verb layer.

plugins.name: acronyms
plugins.description: Maintain the vault acronym glossary: wikilink defined terms across the vault, add new entries respecting alphabetical order, detect undefined ALL-CAPS tokens, and triage the Pending section.

plugins.name: orphans
plugins.description: Vault link hygiene: categorize files with no inbound links, find deadend notes (no outbound links), surface Categories-only candidates worth promoting, and log per-run orphan/deadend counts for trend review.
